---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often? -->

**As a** _(role: Admin / Team Leader / Employee / DevOps / etc.)_,
**I want to** _(describe the desired action)_,
**so that** _(describe the benefit or outcome)_.

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like this feature to work. Include UI mockups, diagrams, or examples if applicable. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- What conditions must be met for this feature to be considered complete? -->

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered alternative solutions or existing workarounds? Why are they insufficient? -->

## Priority / Business Impact

<!-- How important is this? Who is affected? What is the impact if not built? -->

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Priority | _(Critical / High / Medium / Low)_ |
| Affected users | _(e.g., All users / Admins only / Enterprise customers)_ |
| Revenue / retention impact | _(e.g., Blocking adoption / Nice to have)_ |

## Technical Considerations

<!-- Optional: Any technical constraints, dependencies, or implementation notes. -->

## Related Issues / PRs

<!-- Link to related issues or PRs. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and feature requests and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided clear acceptance criteria
- [ ] I understand this is a request and not a guarantee of implementation
